name: HexWind
short_description: The ultimate built-for-VR magical combat experience, designed for those who crave intense mayhem & relentless real-world physical gameplay. Catch that perfect flow as you slow time & lay waste to the hordes, all to the adrenaline-pumping beats of an original Metal soundtrack. Prepare to die. A lot.
detailed_description:
IT'S A RITE OF PASSAGE.

Prepare to die... a lot. Battle the undying hordes in this intense VR experience, and dethrone the Lords of Chaos using a combination of Wizard Magic, strategy, time manipulation, and sheer brute force. Featuring fluid combat mechanics, terrifying enemies, stunning graphics, and a heart pounding heavy metal soundtrack, HexWind will test your mettle. Can you prove you're up for the challenge?

TIME IS YOUR WEAPON

Master the art of HexTime to outmaneuver your enemies. Slow down the chaos around you, anticipate attacks, and strike with unparalleled precision. Time manipulation isn’t just a feature—it’s your key to survival.

YOU HAVE ALL THE POWER YOU NEED...BUT CAN YOU WIELD IT?

It’ll take more than a few button presses to face a dozen axes hurtling toward your head..and come out breathing. In HexWind you ARE a master of the elements - but can you master your own physical limitations to fully step into your avatar’s shoes?

UNLESH MAGICAL MAYHEM TO AN ORIGINAL HEAVY METAL SOUNDTRACK

Catch that perfect combat rhythm as you lay waste to hordes of enemies to the adrenaline-pumping beats of an original Metal soundtrack.

THINK YOU CAN SURVIVE THE CHAOS?

In HexWind, survival isn’t guaranteed—it’s earned. Dive into an ethereal dimension of chaos and metal, and flex every magical muscle to battle your way out.

Join the HexWind community and Shape the Journey!

Become a part of the HexWind story! We have regular updates planned, packed with new content, features, and enhancements.

Check out our development roadmap, laying out our ambitious plan to expand the game’s world, abilities, and challenges—all influenced by feedback from players like you.

  • Regular Content Drops: New spells, procedurally generated environments, enemies, collectibles and dungeons to keep the adventure fresh.

  • Community-Driven Development: Your feedback directly impacts game improvements and additions.

  • Join our Insider program: Get sneak peeks at upcoming features and participate in special events.

Can you battle your way out of this arcane world?
